title: Revolve Group Inc (RVLV) Stock Quote and Overview
text: Revolve Group (NYSE: RVLV) is a next-generation fashion retailer focused on Millennial and Generation Z consumers, operating primarily through an e-commerce platform with emerging physical retail presence. The company operates two main segments: REVOLVE, focused on contemporary and designer fashion brands, and FORWARD (FWRD), focused on high-end and luxury fashion. Company Overview: Revolve Group was launched in 2003 by software engineers Michael Mente and Mike Karanikolas. The company leverages social media and a community of fashion influencers to drive merchandising strategy and customer acquisition. Recent Financial Performance: Q1 2026 revenues of $342.9 million, up 16% YoY, with EPS of $0.20, up 25% YoY. Full-year 2025 revenues of $1.226 billion, up 8% YoY, with net income growth and strong free cash flow generation. Stock Performance: Stock has demonstrated volatility, with year-to-date performance reflecting both strong earnings results and valuation concerns. Current analysts consensus is Buy with average price target of $29.73. Market Characteristics: The company operates in the competitive fashion e-commerce sector, facing competition from larger retailers and specialty players. However, Revolve's content-driven strategy and influencer focus differentiate its approach to customer acquisition and brand building.
